name: Lake Side Fit
about: Lake Side Fit is a fitness facility in Bridgman, MI, offering a 6,700 sq ft gym with various amenities and a golf simulator. The venue is a multi-sport center providing group fitness classes, personal training, 24/7 gym access, and indoor golf simulation. It is equipped with an infrared sauna, tanning beds, and showers. The golf simulator is available as a standalone rental or as part of a membership package. Pricing is available through membership commitments with various tiers of access. The venue is focused on community, results, and fitness for all levels.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art golf simulator with realistic courses
Flexible booking and membership options available
Available for individual or unlimited sessions with a membership
